brand_identity.name: Qradient
brand_identity.mission: Bridging the gap between human intuition and artificial intelligence.
brand_identity.visual_style: Glassmorphism, Neon Gradients, Dark Mode, Futuristic

rules: Headings must use tight tracking (-0.02em to -0.05em).
Body text should be lighter (text-gray-300 or text-gray-400) on dark backgrounds for readability.
Use gradient text for key emphasis words only (e.g., 'Future', 'AI', 'Qradient').

gradients.text_gradient: bg-clip-text text-transparent bg-gradient-to-r from-[#ffde00] via-[#ff5e00] to-[#00c6ff]

usage.buttons: bg-white text-black hover:bg-gray-200 transition-colors (Primary) | border border-white/20 hover:bg-white/10 (Secondary)

grid_system.hero: flex flex-col items-center justify-center min-h-screen text-center relative overflow-hidden

buttons.primary: rounded-full px-8 py-3 bg-white text-black font-semibold hover:scale-105 active:scale-95 transition-all duration-300 shadow-[0_0_20px_rgba(255,255,255,0.3)]
buttons.secondary: rounded-full px-8 py-3 border border-white/20 text-white font-medium hover:bg-white/10 transition-all duration-300
buttons.gradient: rounded-full px-8 py-3 bg-gradient-to-r from-[#ffde00] via-[#ff5e00] to-[#00c6ff] text-black font-bold hover:shadow-[0_0_30px_rgba(255,94,0,0.5)] transition-all duration-300

cards.glass: relative overflow-hidden rounded-2xl bg-white/5 backdrop-blur-md border border-white/10 p-8 hover:bg-white/10 transition-all duration-300 group
cards.feature: flex flex-col gap-4 p-8 rounded-2xl bg-gradient-to-b from-white/5 to-transparent border border-white/10 hover:border-[#ff5e00]/50 transition-colors duration-500

inputs.glass: w-full bg-white/5 border border-white/10 rounded-lg px-4 py-3 text-white placeholder-gray-500 focus:outline-none focus:border-[#00c6ff] focus:ring-1 focus:ring-[#00c6ff] transition-all

motion.scroll_reveal: opacity-0 translate-y-8 animate-in fade-in slide-in-from-bottom-8 duration-700

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. IMPLEMENTATION PRIORITY: Start with the Layout Structure (Navbar, Footer) -> Hero -> About -> Jobs -> Contact -> Admin.
2. GRADIENTS: Use the specific gradient 'from-[#ffde00] via-[#ff5e00] to-[#00c6ff]' for the brand identity. Do not use generic rainbows.
3. GLASSMORPHISM: Ensure all cards have 'backdrop-blur-xl' to make the text readable against complex backgrounds.
4. INTERACTIVITY: Every button must have a hover state. Every card must lift slightly on hover.
5. ADMIN PANEL: Keep it clean but use dark mode glassmorphism to match the brand. Don't make it a boring white dashboard.
6. DATABASE: Use local storage or mock API for the MVP if backend is not ready, but structure it for real data.
7. RESPONSIVENESS: The hero text must scale down on mobile. Use 'text-4xl' on mobile vs 'text-8xl' on desktop.
8. DEBUGGING: If animations cause lag, reduce blur radius or switch to solid semi-transparent backgrounds on mobile.
universal_guidelines: Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy.
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters (12-24px blur).
You MUST NOT apply universal transition. Eg: transition: all.
Every interaction needs micro-animations - hover states, transitions.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable.
Subtle grain textures, noise overlays, custom cursors.
Missing categories (especially sponsor logos) = main agent will use placeholder text which is FORBIDDEN.
